channel.title: Dotnettips.wordpress.com on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Dotnettips.wordpress.com on .NET Ramblings

item.title: String Performance: Why Some String Searches Are Slower Than You Think
item.description: String searching is fundamental to modern applications, yet its performance impact is often overlooked. This article explores how common string search patterns can quietly slow down your code—and how small, intentional changes can unlock up to 3× faster execution. Backed by real benchmarks, it shows why paying attention to string search performance matters far more than most developers realize. Link to article: https://dotnettips.com/2026/04/19/string-performance-why-some-string-searches-are-slower-than-you-think/

item.title: Collection Performance: High-Performance Emptiness Checks for Concurrent & Immutable Collections
item.description: Count vs IsEmpty can be the difference between fast code and a performance disaster. For some immutable and concurrent collections, the wrong choice is tens of thousands of times slower. Link to article: https://dotnettips.com/2026/04/12/collection-performance-high-performance-emptiness-checks-for-concurrent-immutable-collections/
